name: SimuGolf Etown
about: SimuGolf Etown is a premium golf simulator venue located in Elizabethtown, KY. As a family-owned business operating since 2021, it offers year-round indoor golf experiences for all skill levels. The facility features two TrackMan bays, which are among only two such centers in the state, and a TruGolf bay, along with amenities like driving ranges, chipping areas, and putting greens. Players can access over 170 virtual golf courses worldwide. The venue provides a variety of services including walk-in sessions, memberships, lessons, leagues, tournaments, and event hosting, all within a welcoming and friendly family atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan technology for detailed swing analysis
Over 170 virtual golf courses from around the world
Year-round indoor golf regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food service provided.
No information about alcohol service provided.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor system available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice to bring your own golf clubs to a simulator facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information provided about outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time depends on the number of players and pace. Simulators typically allow faster play than traditional golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, SimuGolf Etown is explicitly described as a family-friendly environment welcoming all ages, including junior golfers.
